summary: Built LLM-powered smart block selector that analyzes transcripts to determine which blocks to generate
design_decisions: Uses /zo/ask for semantic transcript analysis with structured JSON output format
Loads BLOCK_INDEX.yaml for recipe lookup - determines base recipe from meeting_type + participants
Factors in priorities.yaml for relevance scoring - weighs toward V's current focus (e.g. Careerspan revenue)
Recipe selection logic: internal→internal_*, investor keywords→external_investor, sales keywords→external_sales, else external_standard
300s timeout with exponential backoff retry (2 attempts) for LLM calls
Transcript truncated to 12k chars to stay within context limits while preserving meaningful content
Dry-run mode shows recipe selection without LLM call for fast debugging
JSON output mode for programmatic integration with processing pipeline

select_blocks_return_shape.conditional_selected: array - conditional blocks chosen by LLM
select_blocks_return_shape.conditional_skipped: array - conditional blocks skipped with reasons
select_blocks_return_shape.triggered: array - blocks activated by Zo Take Heed patterns
select_blocks_return_shape.total_blocks: int - count of blocks to generate

notes_for_orchestrator: Selector ready for integration in D3.x pipeline. Tested dry-run successfully. Full LLM test timed out on first attempt (long transcript + structured output), but retry logic now in place with 300s timeout. The block_selector can be imported as a module or called via CLI.
